modules.risk: modal bootstrap/data shaping service with request-vs-subcontract ownership and fallback-sensitive output
scenariosCovered: request-backed header shaping when contractor job id is unavailable
subcontract-backed header shaping when contractor job id is valid
issued-today fallback observability without false success
honest empty state when no approved request ids exist
latest-progress work materials bootstrap before defaults

modules.risk: canonical read shaping, compatibility fallback, and request-item truth materialization are high-value warehouse read boundaries
scenariosCovered: canonical req-head shaping and visibility filtering
compatibility rpc fallback when canonical window fails
canonical request-item materialization when compatibility view is empty

modules.risk: hook-owned subscribe/unsubscribe and remount behavior can drift even when central realtime client is healthy
scenariosCovered: single subscribe and cleanup on unmount
clean remount resubscribe without duplicate churn
visibility-gated refresh behavior

modules.risk: tab-scoped refresh routing and cleanup discipline are lifecycle-sensitive hook behavior
scenariosCovered: incoming tab refresh and cleanup on unmount
expense refresh routed by active tab
skip mismatched tabs without duplicate listener churn

modules.risk: runtime bootstrap chooses platform storage/auth behavior and must not silently false-success on auth failures
scenariosCovered: web localStorage branch with detectSessionInUrl enabled
native-like AsyncStorage branch with detectSessionInUrl disabled
ensureSignedIn success with live session user
ensureSignedIn auth bootstrap failure handling
currentUserId bootstrap failure handling

modules.risk: governance needed at least one real runnable protected-route smoke path after auth
scenariosCovered: seeded auth session opens /profile
profile edit modal opens and closes
profile listing modal opens and closes
web runtime completes without page errors or bad responses
